title: Geepas Rice Cooker, 0.6L | Electric Rice Cooker with Keep Warm Function, Automatic Cooking, Non-Stick Inner Pot | Includes Measuring Cup, Spatula & Glass Lid | 300W, 2 Year Warranty
features: ✅ 0.6 L RICE COOKER – This small cooker has a 600 ml capacity, and is ideal for couples, individuals or small families looking to make the most perfect flavoursome rice quickly and easily. Perfect for cooking all types of rice - including Arborio, jasmine, white, basmati, long grain and more. The rice cooker also comes with a measuring cup to ensure you always get your portions right & a spatula for serving.

✅ KEEP-WARM FUNCTION, SMART STEAM – The rice cooker switches automatically into keep-warm mode as soon as the rice has cooked, ensuring deliciously fresh rice for long hours and the 2-light indicator on the front of the machine will indicate when the rice is either being cooked or being kept warm.

✅ REMOVABLE BOWL, COOL TOUCH HANDLES - The non-stick bowl is removable so you can easily transfer it to your dining room table. The bowl's inside is also coated with a non-stick covering, making cleaning even more simple, and making the bowl require less oils or fats to cook with. This rice cooker has a cool touch handles and nonslip feet that will ensure complete safety when cooking in a busy environment.

✅ NO BURNING, SIMPLE TO USE, EASY CLEAN NON-STICK INNER POT – Rice does not burn thanks to the non-stick coated inner pot. The inner pot is made from a non-stick material making it super easy to clean and maintain.
description: Product Description 600ML CAPACITY This 600ml mini rice cooker is perfect for couples or small families to cook delicious, fluffy rice quickly and easily. ONE TOUCH OPERATION Cook perfect rice effortlessly with one-touch operation, making mealtime simple, fast, and hassle-free. OVERHEAT PROTECTION Designed for safety, this appliance features reliable overheat protection for hassle-free use every time. DURABLE CONSTRUCTION Cook safely with cool-touch handles and nonslip feet, perfect for busy kitchens and hassle-free meal prep. AUTOMATIC COOKING Cook all types of rice effortlessly – Arborio, jasmine, basmati, long grain, white, and more with ease. COOK & KEEP WARM Effortlessly cook perfect rice with Cook & Warm modes, ensuring fluffy, ready-to-serve meals every time. USER FRIENDLY Non-stick inner pot ensures effortless cleaning and maintenance, making cooking simple and hassle-free. EASY TO CLEAN This compact cooker comes with removable attachments, making it effortless to clean and maintain after every use.
